reviews.author: Schusty882022
reviews.title: Great
reviews.content:
I’ve been using Revolut for years now and it’s been a really smooth experience. The app is easy to use, with instant notifications and great budgeting tools that help keep track of spending.

Transfers are quick and cheap, especially internationally, and the multi-currency feature is perfect for travel. Security features like card freezing and virtual cards add extra peace of mind.

Overall, a modern, reliable alternative to traditional banking.

reviews.author: Isadorraavlive
reviews.title: I would never change REVOLUT IS MY BANK FOREVER
reviews.content:
If you’re still relying on traditional banks, it might be time to seriously reconsider. I’ve used Revolut across Personal, Pro, and Ultra accounts, and I’m even opening my business account with them—and the difference is on another level.
What convinced me the most is the security and control. With Revolut, I actually feel like my money is protected. Everything is instant, transparent, and managed from the app. Features like real-time notifications, card controls, and advanced security give a level of confidence I never had with older banks.
On top of that, the flexibility is unmatched. Whether you’re managing daily spending, running side income through Pro, or preparing for a full business account, everything connects seamlessly. No delays, no unnecessary complications—just a system that works.
Traditional banks often feel outdated, slow, and reactive. Revolut feels modern, fast, and built around the user. I haven’t had a single issue, and that consistency is exactly why I trust them with all my finances.
For anyone thinking about switching: it’s absolutely worth it. Once you experience the speed, security, and convenience, it’s very hard to go back.

insights.summary: Most users report a smooth and positive experience with the app. The main issues mentioned relate to limited customer support accessibility, card delivery fees, and lack of certain features such as overdrafts and loans.

examples: difficult to find help or talk to a person
no direct customer interaction easily available
topProblems.name: Customer support difficulties

examples: free bank cards from competitors but not here
topProblems.name: Card delivery fees

examples: lack of credit cards and loans like competitors
topProblems.name: Missing financial features
